name: Empowerment Zone Employment Credit

eligibility.description: Employer must pay wages to a 'qualified zone employee' who performs substantially all services within an empowerment zone and maintains their principal residence within that same zone.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A 20% tax credit on the first $15,000 of qualified wages paid to employees who both live and work within a federally designated empowerment zone.
